sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ لُجَيْنُ ضَوْءًا أَصْفَرَ يَتَحَرَّكُ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lujain je vidjela žuto svjetlo kako se kreće u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Lujain saw a yellow light moving in the garden.

sentences.arabic: نَادَتْ أَبَاهَا وَقَالَتْ: انْظُرْ إِلَى ذَلِكَ الضَّوْءِ!
sentences.translation: Pozvala je oca i rekla: Pogledaj to svjetlo!
sentences.translationEn: She called her father and said: Look at that light!
They went out to the garden together.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَا حَشَرَةً صَغِيرَةً مُضِيئَةً تَطِيرُ بَيْنَ الزُّهُورِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašli su malu sjajnu insektu koja leti između cvijeća.
sentences.translationEn: They found a small glowing insect flying among the flowers.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: هَذِهِ يَرَاعَةٌ، تُضِيءُ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Ovo je krijesnica, svietli noću.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: This is a firefly, it glows at night.
